pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although AI/ML Engineering is an edge domain for the Director of Data Operations, this skill KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.521) and conceptual alignment to include at the director level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (AI/ML Engineering), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.521). External reviewers may question whether this specific skill KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Director of Data Operations versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: O*NET, DCWF, and ML engineering job market data confirm AI/ML competencies for technical data leadership roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with AI/ML Engineering appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Director of Data Operations.

decision_rationale: Edge-domain AI/ML Engineering skill KSA cleared adversarial review with score 0.521. Included based on sufficient framework alignment and role relevance for the Director of Data Operations.
